column15: Currently contains all affinity and defence values for bosses and some higher level NPCs
Higher affinity equals more hit chance, in other words, lower defence.
Note that most of these NPCs have no weakness, so the weakness value is not used at all.
For demons, darklight uses the weakness value instead of Melee regardless of weakness.
This includes Kal'gerion demons and demon mobs, who by default have no weaknesses.
← Should be close to actual values
